input: What Pantang Food package durations are available?
expected:
Q: What Pantang Food package durations are available?
A: Pantang Food packages are available for 1, 3, 5, 10, 20, or 40 days.

input: Berapa caj ultrasound hati di Melaka?
expected:
Q: Berapa caj ultrasound hati di Melaka?
A: Untuk ultrasound hati, pilih pakej Upper Abdomen Scan. Harga di Negeri Sembilan, Melaka & Pahang: RM165.80 pada hari bekerja dan RM185.80 pada hujung minggu. Harga termasuk Booking Fee + SST 8%.

input: Which branch or area is this contact for?
expected:
Q: Which branch or area is this contact for?
A: This contact is for Sonobee KL/Selangor.

input: Bila slot 5D scan tersedia di Wisma Merdeka?
expected:
Q: Bila slot 5D scan tersedia di Wisma Merdeka?
A: Slot untuk 5D scan tersedia pada hari Ahad hingga Rabu.

input: What are the current operating days for Pasir Gudang?
expected:
Q: What are the current operating days for Pasir Gudang?
A: Currently, Pasir Gudang is covered on Tuesday and Sunday only.

input: Doktor atau sonographer di Sonobee Kuala Besut lelaki atau perempuan?
expected:
Q: Doktor atau sonographer di Sonobee Kuala Besut lelaki atau perempuan?
A: Sonographer di Sonobee Kuala Besut ialah perempuan.

input: Do you have a Sonobee/Sono Ultrasound branch in Kamunting?
expected:
Q: Do you have a Sonobee/Sono Ultrasound branch in Kamunting?
A: Yes. Sono @ Kamunting Perak is located at 41 & No 43 Jalan Kamunting, Jalan Medan Saujana, Kamunting, 34600 Perak.

input: Kalau link booking tak boleh masuk, boleh booking melalui app?
expected:
Q: Kalau link booking tak boleh masuk, boleh booking melalui app?
A: Ya. Jika pautan tidak boleh diakses, cuba pasang aplikasi Flabee Care dan buat tempahan melalui aplikasi tersebut.

input: Macam mana nak batalkan booking atau appointment?
expected:
Q: Macam mana nak batalkan booking atau appointment?
A: Klik “Manage Appointment” dan pilih cancel untuk batalkan appointment.

input: Boleh tukar email akaun dalam apps?
expected:
Q: Boleh tukar email akaun dalam apps?
A: Ya, email boleh diedit di bahagian Account dalam apps.
